title: myosotis decumbens subsp. teresiana
intro: Myosotis decumbens subsp. teresiana, also known as the alpine forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Myosotis decumbens subsp. teresiana include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
